problem: Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs?
mechanism: Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins
hypothesis: Combining Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 34 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
